scripts.dev:promo: cd internal/promo && bun install && bun run dev
scripts.build: bun run build:version && bun run build:migrations && bun run --filter @nodrix/web build && bun run --filter @nodrix/worker build
scripts.build:promo: cd internal/promo && bun install && bun run build
scripts.deploy:platform: bun run build && bun run --filter @nodrix/worker deploy
scripts.deploy:promo: cd internal/promo && bun install && bun run deploy
